affordability_score.public_meaning: Lower official rent-to-income context scores higher.

safety_score.public_meaning: Lower recorded-crime rate scores higher; public copy must call this recorded crime, never safety.

energy_score.public_meaning: Higher median EPC band scores higher using fixed A-G anchors.

flood_score.public_meaning: Lower covered postcode share in England flood-risk zones scores higher; unsupported areas are null.

convenience_score.public_meaning: More nearby amenities and shorter station distance score higher.

evidence_quality.strong_requires: all components available, supported jurisdictional coverage, all_component_source_dates_known=true, and no critical coarse-grain dependency
evidence_quality.mixed_when: most components are available but at least one relies on coarse grain, an indicative sample, or incomplete provenance
evidence_quality.limited_when: a critical denominator or jurisdictional source is unavailable, or fewer than three components are available
